title: Why “jason momoa” is trending in AU: 500+ searches, the facts (July 18, 2026)
description: “jason momoa” is trending in AU with 500+ searches reported by Google. The verified coverage behind the spike, from Collider and 2 more.

sources.title: Prime Video’s 122-Minute Action Hit Is Officially One of the Biggest Movies on Streaming
DC Finally Unveils Aquaman's New Look for Its Post-Jason Momoa Era
Netflix’s Brutal 3-Season Jason Momoa Series Is Officially More Timely Than Ever

sections.heading: What is trending: “jason momoa”
paragraphs: “jason momoa” appeared on Google Trends' Trending Now list for AU (snapshot taken 2026-07-18T09:08:44+00:00 UTC). Google reports at least 500 searches for this term — that figure is a lower bound published in the official Trends feed, not an exact count.

sections.heading: What's behind the spike — the coverage
paragraphs: The Trends feed associates this search spike with 3 news stories from Collider, MovieWeb, ScreenRant. The headlines, exactly as published:
list: “Prime Video’s 122-Minute Action Hit Is Officially One of the Biggest Movies on Streaming” — MovieWeb
“DC Finally Unveils Aquaman's New Look for Its Post-Jason Momoa Era” — ScreenRant
“Netflix’s Brutal 3-Season Jason Momoa Series Is Officially More Timely Than Ever” — Collider

sections.heading: Timeline
paragraphs: The trend entry was published to the Google Trends feed at Sat, 18 Jul 2026 00:50:00 -0700. Our snapshot was taken at 2026-07-18T09:08:44+00:00 UTC and this briefing was assembled at 2026-07-18T09:08:54+00:00 UTC.

sections.heading: How to read these numbers
paragraphs: Google Trends reports approximate search volume as a lower bound (for example “20K+”). Actual volume can be significantly higher. Trending status reflects acceleration in searches, not the absolute size of a topic. For the full story behind the spike, read the cited coverage below — this briefing intentionally adds no speculation beyond the sourced facts.

faq.a: Google's Trending Now feed links the spike to coverage from Collider, MovieWeb, ScreenRant. The associated headlines are: “Prime Video’s 122-Minute Action Hit Is Officially One of the Biggest Movies on Streaming” (MovieWeb); “DC Finally Unveils Aquaman's New Look for Its Post-Jason Momoa Era” (ScreenRant); “Netflix’s Brutal 3-Season Jason Momoa Series Is Officially More Timely Than Ever” (Collider).

faq.q: How many people searched for “jason momoa”?
faq.a: Google reports at least 500 searches in AU as of the feed snapshot. This is a published lower bound, not an exact count.
This snapshot covers AU. The same term may trend differently in other regions.
